name: TEST - Tax Code Required (No Line Items, PO Backed) (CIB)
trigger_condition:
(
  not is_empty(field.line_items_present) and field.line_items_present == 'false'
  and not is_empty(field.po_backed) and field.po_backed == 'true'
  and is_empty(field.tax_code_match)
)

payload.content: This field must be filled in for the document to be submitted to Coupa.
